_notes: Source: iit-proj-patient (clinical research, de-identified). Target: US Core patient (US realm interoperability). Source bans name, address, generalPractitioner for de-identification and has mandatory research extensions. Target requires name, has USCDI extensions, and adds mandatory identifier sub-element constraints.

drifts.description: Source constraints removed: [iit-pat-1 (error: Research patient must have a study identifier), iit-pat-2 (warning: Deceased patients should have a deceased date)]. US Core patient has no root-level constraints.
Mandatory extension studyEnrollmentDate[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; US Core does not define it.
Mandatory extension consentStatus[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target. Source required this extension; US Core does not define it.
Optional extension studyArm[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Optional extension dataUseRestriction[0..* mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
New extension race[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI v1 annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension ethnicity[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI v1 annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension tribalAffiliation[0..* mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension birthsex[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target. Source does not define this extension.
New extension sex[0..1 mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
New extension genderIdentity[0..* mustSupport=false] added in target (USCDI annotation). Source does not define this extension.
Identifier slicing scheme changed: source defines named slices [studyId[1..1], siteId[0..1]]; US Core has no named identifier slices (only general sub-element constraints at identifier level).
identifier.type cardinality relaxed: source constrains identifier.type [1..1 mustSupport=true] within studyId slice; US Core does not constrain identifier.type at general level.
identifier.type pattern removed: source has patternCodeableConcept for the study identifier type in iit-proj slice; US Core has no identifier.type pattern on the general element.
Source mandatory slice studyId[1..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in US Core patient.
Source optional slice siteId[0..1 mustSupport=true] removed in target. No equivalent slice in US Core patient.

New mandatory constraint on identifier.system at general identifier level: target adds identifier.system[1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source constrains system only within named slices (studyId, siteId), not at the general identifier level.

New mandatory constraint on identifier.value at general identifier level: target adds identifier.value[1..1 mustSupport=true]. Source constrains value only within named slices, not at the general identifier level.
active cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (US Core does not constrain active).

name cardinality changed: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [1..* mustSupport=true]. Name is required in US Core but prohibited in iit-proj for de-identification. Fundamental incompatibility.
telecom.system cardinality changed: source inherits R4 base [0..1 mustSupport=false]; target adds [1..1 mustSupport=true required:contact-point-system]. New mandatory constraint in target.
telecom.value cardinality changed: source inherits R4 base [0..1 mustSupport=false]; target adds [1..1 mustSupport=true]. New mandatory constraint in target.
telecom.use MustSupport added with required binding in target (source not constrained; target mustSupport=true required:contact-point-use). Source inherits R4 base.
birthDate cardinality relaxed: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=true] (US Core no explicit min, inherits R4 base min=0). MustSupport preserved.
MustSupport removed on deceased[x] (source mustSupport=true types=[boolean, dateTime]; target mustSupport=false). Same types as R4 base, no type drift.

address cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (completely banned) → target [0..* mustSupport=true]. Ban removed in US Core; address and sub-elements (line, city, postalCode) are mustSupport=true in target. Source had no address at all.
New binding added on address.state in target: extensible(us-core-usps-state VS). Source has no address.state constraint (address was banned). New binding restricts acceptable state values.
photo cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (US Core does not restrict photo). Ban removed.
communication MustSupport removed (source mustSupport=true; target mustSupport=false in US Core differential).

communication.language binding changed: source extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages) → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/simple-language). Different value sets, same strength.
generalPractitioner cardinality relaxed: source [0..0] (banned) → target [0..*] (US Core does not constrain generalPractitioner). Ban removed.
Reference target removed in target: source constrains to iit-proj/Organization; US Core does not constrain managingOrganization (no target profile).
MustSupport removed on managingOrganization (source mustSupport=true; US Core does not constrain managingOrganization).
